subcodes.first_line: O Lord of the Kingdom! Though I am weak, Thou art the Mighty and the Powerful; though I am poor, Thou art the All-Sufficient, the Peerless Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب الملکوت هر چند ضعیفم توای مقتدر و توانا فقیرم توای غنی و رب بیهمتا ای
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for women, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
